things.name: Lake Malawi National Park (Cape Maclear)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage freshwater lake with crystal-clear water and 800+ cichlid fish species

things.name: Lilongwe Wildlife Centre
things.description: Rescued pangolins, lions and other Malawian wildlife in a 180-hectare urban sanctuary

things.name: Nyika National Park
things.description: Africa's highest plateau - rolling montane grasslands with roan antelope and leopard

things.name: Old Town Market
things.description: Malawi's oldest market with beautiful hand-woven textiles and carved wooden crafts

things.name: Kamuzu Mausoleum
things.description: Mausoleum of Malawi's first president - Life President Hastings Banda

things.name: Liwonde National Park
things.description: Excellent wildlife park on the Shire River with hippos, elephants and black rhino

things.name: Nkhotakota Pottery
things.description: Malawi's best pottery tradition - see bowls, pots and decorative ware being made

things.name: Blantyre & Zomba Day Trip
things.description: Malawi's commercial capital and former capital with colonial architecture

things.name: Dedza Pottery & Forest Reserve
things.description: Studio pottery and pine forest at 1,500m

things.name: Chambo Fish (Tilapia)
things.description: Malawi's national dish - Chambo tilapia from Lake Malawi, grilled or fried with nsima porridge
